items.title: I'm told that Narcisse Ngoy was not expecting to be drafted -- by the Clippers or any team. It's been described to me as "an unprecedented and fluid situation" but Clippers front office has been in touch since the draft and that conversations will be ongoing on this front
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: I'm told that Narcisse Ngoy was not expecting to be drafted -- by the Clippers or any team. It's been described to me as "an unprecedented and fluid situation" but Clippers front office has been in touch since the draft and that conversations will be ongoing on this front

items.title: LA Clippers have officially announced that they’ve acquired the draft rights to Narcisse Ngoy, the 57th overall pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, and cash considerations from the Atlanta Hawks in exchange for the 52nd overall pick.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: LA Clippers have officially announced that they’ve acquired the draft rights to Narcisse Ngoy, the 57th overall pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, and cash considerations from the Atlanta Hawks in exchange for the 52nd overall pick.

items.title: With the 57th pick of the NBA Draft the Atlanta Hawks select Narcisse Ngoy!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
With the 57th pick of the NBA Draft the Atlanta Hawks select Narcisse Ngoy!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: The LA Clippers have selected Narcisse Ngoy, a center from France, with the 57th overall selection in the 2026 NBA Draft.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: The LA Clippers have selected Narcisse Ngoy, a center from France, with the 57th overall selection in the 2026 NBA Draft.
